sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88584" key="prosanaple/kw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-πλέκω</orth>, <sense id="n88584.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mix in as well</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
